raw_consumer_statement: I Had A Credit Of XXXX $ On My Account Before This Fiasco Started. I Was A Victim of A Scam XXXX XXXX  on XXXX. I purchased Some Items Total of XXXX $ Due To Some XXXX Issues I Was Having I Inadvertently Purchased A Duplicate Order In The Amount Of XXXX $ I Tried To Contact The Merchant To Cancel One Of The Orders. No Response. I Get My Credit Card Company citi.XXXX Involved. I Guess Their Computer Algorithm Is Programmed To Throw Their Customers To The Wolves. In Order To Protect My Credit Score I Ended up Paying For Both The Fraudulent Orders. I Never Received any Of The Items I Ordered From Both Orders I Feel So Unappreciated As A Customer I Close my Account
